params.name: objectType
params.description: The type of CRM object to filter event instances on

params.name: objectId
params.description: The ID of the CRM object to filter events. Requires objectType parameter.

params.name: eventType
params.description: Filter by specific event type name

params.name: occurredAfter
params.description: Filter for events that occurred after this ISO 8601 datetime

params.name: occurredBefore
params.description: Filter for events that occurred before this ISO 8601 datetime

params.name: sort
params.description: Sort direction based on event timestamp

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of results per page (1-100)

params.name: after
params.description: Pagination cursor for the next page of results

items.docs:
Retrieve instances of event completion data from your HubSpot account. 
Use this endpoint to query events associated with specific CRM objects, 
filter by event type and date range, and paginate through large result sets. 
This is useful for analyzing user engagement and tracking conversion funnels.

Retrieve a list of all available event types in your HubSpot account. 
Use this endpoint to discover what event types exist before querying 
for specific event instances. This helps build dynamic filtering interfaces
and validate event type parameters.
